name: Herbed Chick Pea Patties (Ovo Lacto)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container or food processor, combine all ingredients and process until smooth.
2. Preheat a nonstick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
3. Drop the mixture onto the griddle or pan, making twelve 3-inch patties.
4. Cook the patties until brown on both sides, turning once.
